title: Declaration Under Section 241
text:
1950-07
Public Health
Subsidiary Legislation made under s.241.
Declaration Under Section 241
LN.2026/076
Commencement 16.4.2026
_______________________
In exercise of the powers conferred upon it by section 241 of the Public Health Act and all
other enabling powers, the Government has declared the following streets to be public
highways-
(a) Tangier View Lane
;
